entries.designSummary: Humanoid robot wolf/dog goal guardian with dark gunmetal armor, tall ears, amber eyes, amber chest core, compact heroic stance, and small blue LED accents.
Humanoid robot fox skill scout with sharp ears, slim agile armor, orange eyes/core, orange and cyan light strips, and a confident strategic stance.
Humanoid robot bear deep-work anchor with larger rounded armor, blue eyes/core, bronze claws, heavy arms, and calm grounded posture.
Humanoid robot cat/panther stealth automation companion with smooth dark armor, violet eyes/core, flexible posture, and minimal low-noise detailing.
Humanoid robot rabbit reminder companion with long mechanical ears, compact upbeat proportions, green eyes/core, spring-like legs, and friendly expression.
Humanoid robot owl/eagle memory companion with wing-like shoulder panels, blue eyes/core, gold beak and trim, and observant mentor-like posture.
